title: Farmer's Tea Resteeped
description: Adds new Simply Tea! recipes to Farmer's Delight cooking pot.
body:
![Farmer's Tea logo](https://i.imgur.com/Odf9BrF.png)

Makes [Simply Tea!](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-tea) compatible with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - adds vanilla-friendly recipes for tea to the cooking pot. Farmer's Delight is a required dependency (duh). If something doesn't work or you have a suggestion, [click here](https://github.com/KreloX/farmers-tea/issues) to go to the issues page.

![Gif of crafting chai tea in a Farmer's Delight cooking pot](https://i.imgur.com/45DBTHW.gif)

This is a ported version of [Farmer's Tea](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-tea) for newer versions of Minecraft

[![Kinetic Hosting code KreloX banner](https://1drv.ms/i/c/6bf544900f9867ae/IQR3yxNMtle9S4RxniPeeGgMAVrcnQ4U65DGA1uiSdBUIbE?width=837&height=80)](https://tinyurl.com/kreloxkinetic)
